prompt: Make the lead melody play the same notes but in triplet rhythm.

args.content:
ch 1 Melody
  plugin mini
  strip console1

ch 2 Bass
  plugin bass
  strip console1

ch 3 Chords
  plugin jup8
  strip console1

ch 4 Kick
  plugin kick

ch 5 Snare
  plugin drums

ch 6 HiHat
  plugin drums

arr verse 4 chorus 4

sec verse
  ch 1 Melody
    p t t t t _t _t _t _t _t _t _t _t
    n 60 62 64 65

  ch 2 Bass
    p q _q q _q
    n 36

    n 48 52 55

    p q _q q _q
    n 36

  ch 5 Snare

    n 38

    n 42
